name: Bully's Girlfriend《 Netori 》
description:
[ Reverse NTR / Netori ]

After getting bullied everyday by the bully, you finally had enough. Something snapped and you beat the bully up to a pulp, hospitalising him for a month.

While the bully is still hospitalised, you decided to plot a revenge plan, trying to break your bully slowly.

You start with the bully's girlfriend, the popular girl of the school. You secretly gathered informations about her, preparing yourself for your revenge.
creator: Tzyry
